case_title: JOSE N OREGEL VS. ANITA M LOPEZ PEREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-07-2016 IS CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUL-11-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID JUDGMENT CREDITOR $800 BY MONEY ORDER TODAY IN COURT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PAY BALANCE OF $550 IN COURT ON JULY 11, 2016. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER LENIN JARQUIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED AUG-12-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ PEREZ, ANITA M

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2015 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-09-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR AT LEAST $50.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING FEBRUARY 5, 2015", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---LENIN ERNESTO--JAROQUIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---LENIN JANQUIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARTA RESEN. NO COSTS, IFP FILED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER OF EXAMINATION, JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S STATEMENT OF ASSETS SERVED TO ANITA LOPEZ PEREZ. FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OREGEL, JOSE N
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OREGEL, JOSE N RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ PEREZ, ANITA M $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-09-2015 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-13-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAYS JUDGMENT CREDITOR $150.00 (FEB. MAR. APRIL) IN COURT TODAY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---LENIN ERNESTO--JAROQUIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ PEREZ, ANITA M
DECLARATION OF OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ PEREZ, ANITA M
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,864.53 FILED BY OREGEL, JOSE N AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ PEREZ, ANITA M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ PEREZ, ANITA M HEARING SET FOR JAN-08-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2016 IS CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO APR-07-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $1350 BY CASH OR MONEY ORDER IN COURT ON APRIL 7, 2016. JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR BOTH APPEARED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER LENIN JARQUIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JOSE N. OREGEL & DEFENDANT ANITA M. LOPEZ PEREZ. DEFENDANT PAYS PLAINTIFF THE REMAINING BALANCE OF FIVE HUNDRED FIFTY ($550.00) DOLLARS IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE IN ROOM 103. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
